new_classes.label_en: Other Vinegar (not Wine Vinegar) in Containers of 2 Litres or Less (CN 22090091)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Essig (kein Weinessig) in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 Litern oder weniger (KN 22090091)
new_classes.definition_en: Vinegar and substitutes for vinegar obtained from acetic acid, other than wine vinegar, presented in containers holding 2 litres or less, classified under CN code 22090091 (Chapter 22). Includes products referred to in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2209, part (I), second paragraph, (2), (3) and (4), and part (II), in small containers.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 22090091 covers "Other" vinegar (i.e. not wine vinegar) in small containers (≤ 2 L), and cross-references HS Explanatory Note to heading 2209, part (I) second paragraph items (2)–(4) and part (II). The proposed axioms capture: (1) the product type as a subclass of Vinegar disjoint from WineVinegar, (2) the container volume constraint (≤ 2 L), and (3) the CN code string. What cannot be fully represented in OWL without importing HS Explanatory Notes is the exhaustive enumeration of specific product categories from those note references (e.g. fermentation-based vinegar substitutes, cider vinegar, other fruit vinegars, synthetic acetic acid substitutes referenced in parts (I)(2)–(4) and (II)). The disjointness from WineVinegar is expressed via a complement restriction. Overall coverage is good for structural/container criteria but incomplete for the specific HS note product-type enumeration.
